name: Web Search
natural_prompt:
You are a helpful assistant with access to the following tools.
For each user message, respond with ONLY the tool name(s) you would use, separated by commas. If no tool is needed, respond with "none".
Do not explain your reasoning. Only output tool names.

Available tools:

Tool: web_search
  Description: Search the web for current information. Use this tool when you need to find recent events, news, product information, or any data that may have changed since your training cutoff.
  Parameters:
    - query (string, required): The search query to find relevant web pages
    - num_results (number, optional): Number of results to return, between 1 and 20
    - time_range (string, optional): Filter results by time period [past_hour, past_day, past_week, past_month, past_year]

Tool: send_email
  Description: Send an email message to one or more recipients. Supports plain text and HTML content, attachments, and CC/BCC recipients.
  Parameters:
    - to (string, required): Recipient email address or comma-separated list of addresses
    - subject (string, required): Email subject line
    - body (string, required): Email body content in plain text or HTML
    - cc (string, optional): CC recipient email address or comma-separated list
    - attachments (array, optional): List of file paths to attach to the email

Tool: create_task
  Description: Create a new task or to-do item in the task management system. Tasks can be assigned to team members with due dates and priority levels.
  Parameters:
    - title (string, required): Title or name of the task
    - description (string, optional): Detailed description of what needs to be done
    - assignee (string, optional): Username or email of the person responsible
    - due_date (string, optional): Due date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)
    - priority (string, optional): Priority level of the task [low, medium, high, critical]

Tool: read_file
  Description: Read the contents of a file from the local filesystem. Returns the full text content of the specified file.
  Parameters:
    - path (string, required): Absolute or relative path to the file to read
    - encoding (string, optional): Character encoding to use when reading the file [utf-8, ascii, latin1, utf-16]

Tool: write_file
  Description: Write content to a file on the local filesystem. Creates the file if it does not exist, or overwrites the existing content.
  Parameters:
    - path (string, required): Absolute or relative path to the file to write
    - content (string, required): The text content to write to the file
    - append (boolean, optional): If true, append to the file instead of overwriting

Tool: run_command
  Description: Execute a shell command on the local system. Returns the standard output, standard error, and exit code of the command.
  Parameters:
    - command (string, required): The shell command to execute
    - working_dir (string, optional): Working directory for command execution
    - timeout (number, optional): Maximum execution time in seconds before the command is killed

Tool: calendar_event
  Description: Create, update, or query calendar events. Supports setting time, location, attendees, and recurrence rules for scheduling.
  Parameters:
    - action (string, required): The calendar operation to perform [create, update, delete, list]
    - title (string, required): Title or name of the calendar event
    - start_time (string, optional): Event start time in ISO 8601 format
    - end_time (string, optional): Event end time in ISO 8601 format
    - attendees (array, optional): List of attendee email addresses

Tool: database_query
  Description: Execute a SQL query against the connected database. Supports SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE operations with parameterized queries.
  Parameters:
    - query (string, required): The SQL query to execute
    - params (array, optional): Parameterized values to safely inject into the query
    - database (string, optional): Name of the database to query, defaults to the primary database

Tool: translate_text
  Description: Translate text from one language to another. Supports over 100 languages with automatic source language detection.
  Parameters:
    - text (string, required): The text to translate
    - target_language (string, required): Target language code (e.g., en, de, fr, ja, zh)
    - source_language (string, optional): Source language code; if omitted, language is auto-detected

Tool: image_generate
  Description: Generate an image from a text description using AI image generation. Returns a URL to the generated image.
  Parameters:
    - prompt (string, required): Detailed text description of the image to generate
    - size (string, optional): Image dimensions in pixels [256x256, 512x512, 1024x1024, 1792x1024]
    - style (string, optional): Visual style for the generated image [photorealistic, illustration, watercolor, sketch]

Tool: get_weather
  Description: Get current weather conditions and forecast for a specified location. Returns temperature, humidity, wind speed, and conditions.
  Parameters:
    - location (string, required): City name, ZIP code, or coordinates (lat,lon)
    - units (string, optional): Temperature units [celsius, fahrenheit]
    - forecast_days (number, optional): Number of forecast days to include (1-7)

Tool: slack_message
  Description: Send a message to a Slack channel or user. Supports rich text formatting, mentions, and thread replies.
  Parameters:
    - channel (string, required): Slack channel name (e.g., #general) or user ID for direct message
    - message (string, required): The message text to send, supports Slack markdown
    - thread_ts (string, optional): Timestamp of parent message to reply in a thread

Tool: create_spreadsheet
  Description: Create or modify a spreadsheet with data. Supports creating sheets, writing cell values, and applying basic formulas.
  Parameters:
    - title (string, required): Title of the spreadsheet
    - data (array, required): Two-dimensional array of cell values representing rows and columns
    - sheet_name (string, optional): Name of the worksheet tab

Tool: pdf_extract
  Description: Extract text content, tables, and metadata from a PDF document. Returns structured text with page boundaries preserved.
  Parameters:
    - file_path (string, required): Path to the PDF file to extract content from
    - pages (string, optional): Page range to extract (e.g., "1-5", "1,3,7")
    - extract_tables (boolean, optional): If true, attempt to extract tabular data as structured arrays

Tool: code_review
  Description: Perform an automated code review on a file or code snippet. Identifies bugs, security issues, style violations, and suggests improvements.
  Parameters:
    - code (string, required): The source code to review, or a file path
    - language (string, optional): Programming language of the code [javascript, typescript, python, java, go, rust, csharp]
    - focus (string, optional): Area to focus the review on [bugs, security, performance, style, all]

Tool: git_operation
  Description: Perform git version control operations on a repository. Supports common operations like commit, push, pull, branch, and status.
  Parameters:
    - operation (string, required): The git operation to perform [status, commit, push, pull, branch, checkout, log, diff]
    - message (string, optional): Commit message (required for commit operation)
    - branch (string, optional): Branch name for branch or checkout operations

Tool: api_request
  Description: Make an HTTP request to an external API endpoint. Supports all HTTP methods, custom headers, and request bodies.
  Parameters:
    - url (string, required): The full URL of the API endpoint
    - method (string, required): HTTP method to use [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE]
    - headers (object, optional): HTTP headers as key-value pairs
    - body (string, optional): Request body content, typically JSON

Tool: convert_currency
  Description: Convert an amount from one currency to another using real-time exchange rates. Supports all major world currencies.
  Parameters:
    - amount (number, required): The amount of money to convert
    - from_currency (string, required): Source currency ISO code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)
    - to_currency (string, required): Target currency ISO code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)

Tool: calculate
  Description: Evaluate a mathematical expression or perform calculations. Supports arithmetic, trigonometry, statistics, and symbolic math.
  Parameters:
    - expression (string, required): The mathematical expression to evaluate (e.g., "sqrt(144) + 3^2")
    - precision (number, optional): Number of decimal places in the result

Tool: set_reminder
  Description: Set a reminder that will trigger a notification at the specified time. Supports one-time and recurring reminders.
  Parameters:
    - message (string, required): The reminder message text
    - time (string, required): When to trigger the reminder in ISO 8601 format or natural language
    - recurrence (string, optional): Recurrence pattern for repeating reminders [none, daily, weekly, monthly]

Tool: screenshot
  Description: Capture a screenshot of a web page at a given URL. Returns an image of the rendered page.
  Parameters:
    - url (string, required): The URL of the web page to screenshot
    - viewport (string, optional): Viewport size as widthxheight in pixels [1280x720, 1920x1080, 375x812, 768x1024]
    - full_page (boolean, optional): If true, capture the entire scrollable page

Tool: text_to_speech
  Description: Convert text into spoken audio. Returns an audio file URL with the synthesized speech.
  Parameters:
    - text (string, required): The text to convert to speech
    - language (string, optional): Language and locale code (e.g., en-US, de-DE, ja-JP)
    - voice (string, optional): Voice selection [male_1, female_1, male_2, female_2]

Tool: qr_code
  Description: Generate a QR code image encoding the provided data. Supports URLs, text, contact cards, and Wi-Fi credentials.
  Parameters:
    - data (string, required): The data to encode in the QR code
    - size (number, optional): Size of the QR code image in pixels (width and height)

Tool: compress_files
  Description: Compress one or more files into an archive. Supports ZIP, TAR.GZ, and 7Z formats.
  Parameters:
    - files (array, required): List of file paths to include in the archive
    - output_path (string, required): Path for the output archive file
    - format (string, optional): Archive format to use [zip, tar.gz, 7z]

Tool: dns_lookup
  Description: Perform a DNS lookup for a domain name. Returns DNS records including A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, TXT, and NS records.
  Parameters:
    - domain (string, required): The domain name to look up
    - record_type (string, optional): Type of DNS record to query [A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, TXT, NS, ALL]

User message: Search for the latest news about the 2024 Summer Olympics results.

web_search: query*(string), num_results(number), time_range(string) [past_hour|past_day|past_week|past_month|past_year]

run_command: command*(string), working_dir(string), timeout(number)
calendar_event: action*(string) [create|update|delete|list], title*(string), start_time(string), end_time(string), attendees(array)
database_query: query*(string), params(array), database(string)

image_generate: prompt*(string), size(string) [256x256|512x512|1024x1024|1792x1024], style(string) [photorealistic|illustration|watercolor|sketch]
get_weather: location*(string), units(string) [celsius|fahrenheit], forecast_days(number)

pdf_extract: file_path*(string), pages(string), extract_tables(boolean)

git_operation: operation*(string) [status|commit|push|pull|branch|checkout|log|diff], message(string), branch(string)
api_request: url*(string), method*(string) [GET|POST|PUT|PATCH|DELETE], headers(object), body(string)
convert_currency: amount*(number), from_currency*(string), to_currency*(string)
calculate: expression*(string), precision(number)
set_reminder: message*(string), time*(string), recurrence(string) [none|daily|weekly|monthly]
screenshot: url*(string), viewport(string) [1280x720|1920x1080|375x812|768x1024], full_page(boolean)
text_to_speech: text*(string), language(string), voice(string) [male_1|female_1|male_2|female_2]
qr_code: data*(string), size(number)
compress_files: files*(array), output_path*(string), format(string) [zip|tar.gz|7z]
dns_lookup: domain*(string), record_type(string) [A|AAAA|MX|CNAME|TXT|NS|ALL]

Tool: compress_files
  Description: Compress one or more files into an archive. Supports ZIP, TAR.GZ, and 7Z formats.
  Parameters:
    - files (array, required): List of file paths to include in the archive
    - output_path (string, required): Path for the output archive file
    - format (string, optional): Archive format to use [zip, tar.gz, 7z]

Tool: dns_lookup
  Description: Perform a DNS lookup for a domain name. Returns DNS records including A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, TXT, and NS records.
  Parameters:
    - domain (string, required): The domain name to look up
    - record_type (string, optional): Type of DNS record to query [A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, TXT, NS, ALL]

name: Create Task
natural_prompt:
You are a helpful assistant with access to the following tools.
For each user message, respond with ONLY the tool name(s) you would use, separated by commas. If no tool is needed, respond with "none".
Do not explain your reasoning. Only output tool names.

Available tools:

Tool: web_search
  Description: Search the web for current information. Use this tool when you need to find recent events, news, product information, or any data that may have changed since your training cutoff.
  Parameters:
    - query (string, required): The search query to find relevant web pages
    - num_results (number, optional): Number of results to return, between 1 and 20
    - time_range (string, optional): Filter results by time period [past_hour, past_day, past_week, past_month, past_year]

Tool: send_email
  Description: Send an email message to one or more recipients. Supports plain text and HTML content, attachments, and CC/BCC recipients.
  Parameters:
    - to (string, required): Recipient email address or comma-separated list of addresses
    - subject (string, required): Email subject line
    - body (string, required): Email body content in plain text or HTML
    - cc (string, optional): CC recipient email address or comma-separated list
    - attachments (array, optional): List of file paths to attach to the email

Tool: create_task
  Description: Create a new task or to-do item in the task management system. Tasks can be assigned to team members with due dates and priority levels.
  Parameters:
    - title (string, required): Title or name of the task
    - description (string, optional): Detailed description of what needs to be done
    - assignee (string, optional): Username or email of the person responsible
    - due_date (string, optional): Due date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)
    - priority (string, optional): Priority level of the task [low, medium, high, critical]

Tool: read_file
  Description: Read the contents of a file from the local filesystem. Returns the full text content of the specified file.
  Parameters:
    - path (string, required): Absolute or relative path to the file to read
    - encoding (string, optional): Character encoding to use when reading the file [utf-8, ascii, latin1, utf-16]

Tool: write_file
  Description: Write content to a file on the local filesystem. Creates the file if it does not exist, or overwrites the existing content.
  Parameters:
    - path (string, required): Absolute or relative path to the file to write
    - content (string, required): The text content to write to the file
    - append (boolean, optional): If true, append to the file instead of overwriting

Tool: run_command
  Description: Execute a shell command on the local system. Returns the standard output, standard error, and exit code of the command.
  Parameters:
    - command (string, required): The shell command to execute
    - working_dir (string, optional): Working directory for command execution
    - timeout (number, optional): Maximum execution time in seconds before the command is killed

Tool: calendar_event
  Description: Create, update, or query calendar events. Supports setting time, location, attendees, and recurrence rules for scheduling.
  Parameters:
    - action (string, required): The calendar operation to perform [create, update, delete, list]
    - title (string, required): Title or name of the calendar event
    - start_time (string, optional): Event start time in ISO 8601 format
    - end_time (string, optional): Event end time in ISO 8601 format
    - attendees (array, optional): List of attendee email addresses

Tool: database_query
  Description: Execute a SQL query against the connected database. Supports SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE operations with parameterized queries.
  Parameters:
    - query (string, required): The SQL query to execute
    - params (array, optional): Parameterized values to safely inject into the query
    - database (string, optional): Name of the database to query, defaults to the primary database

Tool: translate_text
  Description: Translate text from one language to another. Supports over 100 languages with automatic source language detection.
  Parameters:
    - text (string, required): The text to translate
    - target_language (string, required): Target language code (e.g., en, de, fr, ja, zh)
    - source_language (string, optional): Source language code; if omitted, language is auto-detected

Tool: image_generate
  Description: Generate an image from a text description using AI image generation. Returns a URL to the generated image.
  Parameters:
    - prompt (string, required): Detailed text description of the image to generate
    - size (string, optional): Image dimensions in pixels [256x256, 512x512, 1024x1024, 1792x1024]
    - style (string, optional): Visual style for the generated image [photorealistic, illustration, watercolor, sketch]

Tool: get_weather
  Description: Get current weather conditions and forecast for a specified location. Returns temperature, humidity, wind speed, and conditions.
  Parameters:
    - location (string, required): City name, ZIP code, or coordinates (lat,lon)
    - units (string, optional): Temperature units [celsius, fahrenheit]
    - forecast_days (number, optional): Number of forecast days to include (1-7)

Tool: slack_message
  Description: Send a message to a Slack channel or user. Supports rich text formatting, mentions, and thread replies.
  Parameters:
    - channel (string, required): Slack channel name (e.g., #general) or user ID for direct message
    - message (string, required): The message text to send, supports Slack markdown
    - thread_ts (string, optional): Timestamp of parent message to reply in a thread

Tool: create_spreadsheet
  Description: Create or modify a spreadsheet with data. Supports creating sheets, writing cell values, and applying basic formulas.
  Parameters:
    - title (string, required): Title of the spreadsheet
    - data (array, required): Two-dimensional array of cell values representing rows and columns
    - sheet_name (string, optional): Name of the worksheet tab

Tool: pdf_extract
  Description: Extract text content, tables, and metadata from a PDF document. Returns structured text with page boundaries preserved.
  Parameters:
    - file_path (string, required): Path to the PDF file to extract content from
    - pages (string, optional): Page range to extract (e.g., "1-5", "1,3,7")
    - extract_tables (boolean, optional): If true, attempt to extract tabular data as structured arrays

Tool: code_review
  Description: Perform an automated code review on a file or code snippet. Identifies bugs, security issues, style violations, and suggests improvements.
  Parameters:
    - code (string, required): The source code to review, or a file path
    - language (string, optional): Programming language of the code [javascript, typescript, python, java, go, rust, csharp]
    - focus (string, optional): Area to focus the review on [bugs, security, performance, style, all]

Tool: git_operation
  Description: Perform git version control operations on a repository. Supports common operations like commit, push, pull, branch, and status.
  Parameters:
    - operation (string, required): The git operation to perform [status, commit, push, pull, branch, checkout, log, diff]
    - message (string, optional): Commit message (required for commit operation)
    - branch (string, optional): Branch name for branch or checkout operations

Tool: api_request
  Description: Make an HTTP request to an external API endpoint. Supports all HTTP methods, custom headers, and request bodies.
  Parameters:
    - url (string, required): The full URL of the API endpoint
    - method (string, required): HTTP method to use [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE]
    - headers (object, optional): HTTP headers as key-value pairs
    - body (string, optional): Request body content, typically JSON

Tool: convert_currency
  Description: Convert an amount from one currency to another using real-time exchange rates. Supports all major world currencies.
  Parameters:
    - amount (number, required): The amount of money to convert
    - from_currency (string, required): Source currency ISO code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)
    - to_currency (string, required): Target currency ISO code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)

Tool: calculate
  Description: Evaluate a mathematical expression or perform calculations. Supports arithmetic, trigonometry, statistics, and symbolic math.
  Parameters:
    - expression (string, required): The mathematical expression to evaluate (e.g., "sqrt(144) + 3^2")
    - precision (number, optional): Number of decimal places in the result

Tool: set_reminder
  Description: Set a reminder that will trigger a notification at the specified time. Supports one-time and recurring reminders.
  Parameters:
    - message (string, required): The reminder message text
    - time (string, required): When to trigger the reminder in ISO 8601 format or natural language
    - recurrence (string, optional): Recurrence pattern for repeating reminders [none, daily, weekly, monthly]

Tool: screenshot
  Description: Capture a screenshot of a web page at a given URL. Returns an image of the rendered page.
  Parameters:
    - url (string, required): The URL of the web page to screenshot
    - viewport (string, optional): Viewport size as widthxheight in pixels [1280x720, 1920x1080, 375x812, 768x1024]
    - full_page (boolean, optional): If true, capture the entire scrollable page

Tool: text_to_speech
  Description: Convert text into spoken audio. Returns an audio file URL with the synthesized speech.
  Parameters:
    - text (string, required): The text to convert to speech
    - language (string, optional): Language and locale code (e.g., en-US, de-DE, ja-JP)
    - voice (string, optional): Voice selection [male_1, female_1, male_2, female_2]

Tool: qr_code
  Description: Generate a QR code image encoding the provided data. Supports URLs, text, contact cards, and Wi-Fi credentials.
  Parameters:
    - data (string, required): The data to encode in the QR code
    - size (number, optional): Size of the QR code image in pixels (width and height)

Tool: compress_files
  Description: Compress one or more files into an archive. Supports ZIP, TAR.GZ, and 7Z formats.
  Parameters:
    - files (array, required): List of file paths to include in the archive
    - output_path (string, required): Path for the output archive file
    - format (string, optional): Archive format to use [zip, tar.gz, 7z]

Tool: dns_lookup
  Description: Perform a DNS lookup for a domain name. Returns DNS records including A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, TXT, and NS records.
  Parameters:
    - domain (string, required): The domain name to look up
    - record_type (string, optional): Type of DNS record to query [A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, TXT, NS, ALL]

User message: Create a high-priority task titled "Fix login bug" assigned to sarah@company.com, due next Friday.

name: Read File
natural_prompt:
You are a helpful assistant with access to the following tools.
For each user message, respond with ONLY the tool name(s) you would use, separated by commas. If no tool is needed, respond with "none".
Do not explain your reasoning. Only output tool names.

Available tools:

Tool: web_search
  Description: Search the web for current information. Use this tool when you need to find recent events, news, product information, or any data that may have changed since your training cutoff.
  Parameters:
    - query (string, required): The search query to find relevant web pages
    - num_results (number, optional): Number of results to return, between 1 and 20
    - time_range (string, optional): Filter results by time period [past_hour, past_day, past_week, past_month, past_year]

Tool: send_email
  Description: Send an email message to one or more recipients. Supports plain text and HTML content, attachments, and CC/BCC recipients.
  Parameters:
    - to (string, required): Recipient email address or comma-separated list of addresses
    - subject (string, required): Email subject line
    - body (string, required): Email body content in plain text or HTML
    - cc (string, optional): CC recipient email address or comma-separated list
    - attachments (array, optional): List of file paths to attach to the email

Tool: create_task
  Description: Create a new task or to-do item in the task management system. Tasks can be assigned to team members with due dates and priority levels.
  Parameters:
    - title (string, required): Title or name of the task
    - description (string, optional): Detailed description of what needs to be done
    - assignee (string, optional): Username or email of the person responsible
    - due_date (string, optional): Due date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)
    - priority (string, optional): Priority level of the task [low, medium, high, critical]

Tool: read_file
  Description: Read the contents of a file from the local filesystem. Returns the full text content of the specified file.
  Parameters:
    - path (string, required): Absolute or relative path to the file to read
    - encoding (string, optional): Character encoding to use when reading the file [utf-8, ascii, latin1, utf-16]

Tool: write_file
  Description: Write content to a file on the local filesystem. Creates the file if it does not exist, or overwrites the existing content.
  Parameters:
    - path (string, required): Absolute or relative path to the file to write
    - content (string, required): The text content to write to the file
    - append (boolean, optional): If true, append to the file instead of overwriting

Tool: run_command
  Description: Execute a shell command on the local system. Returns the standard output, standard error, and exit code of the command.
  Parameters:
    - command (string, required): The shell command to execute
    - working_dir (string, optional): Working directory for command execution
    - timeout (number, optional): Maximum execution time in seconds before the command is killed

Tool: calendar_event
  Description: Create, update, or query calendar events. Supports setting time, location, attendees, and recurrence rules for scheduling.
  Parameters:
    - action (string, required): The calendar operation to perform [create, update, delete, list]
    - title (string, required): Title or name of the calendar event
    - start_time (string, optional): Event start time in ISO 8601 format
    - end_time (string, optional): Event end time in ISO 8601 format
    - attendees (array, optional): List of attendee email addresses

Tool: database_query
  Description: Execute a SQL query against the connected database. Supports SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE operations with parameterized queries.
  Parameters:
    - query (string, required): The SQL query to execute
    - params (array, optional): Parameterized values to safely inject into the query
    - database (string, optional): Name of the database to query, defaults to the primary database

Tool: translate_text
  Description: Translate text from one language to another. Supports over 100 languages with automatic source language detection.
  Parameters:
    - text (string, required): The text to translate
    - target_language (string, required): Target language code (e.g., en, de, fr, ja, zh)
    - source_language (string, optional): Source language code; if omitted, language is auto-detected

Tool: image_generate
  Description: Generate an image from a text description using AI image generation. Returns a URL to the generated image.
  Parameters:
    - prompt (string, required): Detailed text description of the image to generate
    - size (string, optional): Image dimensions in pixels [256x256, 512x512, 1024x1024, 1792x1024]
    - style (string, optional): Visual style for the generated image [photorealistic, illustration, watercolor, sketch]

Tool: get_weather
  Description: Get current weather conditions and forecast for a specified location. Returns temperature, humidity, wind speed, and conditions.
  Parameters:
    - location (string, required): City name, ZIP code, or coordinates (lat,lon)
    - units (string, optional): Temperature units [celsius, fahrenheit]
    - forecast_days (number, optional): Number of forecast days to include (1-7)

Tool: slack_message
  Description: Send a message to a Slack channel or user. Supports rich text formatting, mentions, and thread replies.
  Parameters:
    - channel (string, required): Slack channel name (e.g., #general) or user ID for direct message
    - message (string, required): The message text to send, supports Slack markdown
    - thread_ts (string, optional): Timestamp of parent message to reply in a thread

Tool: create_spreadsheet
  Description: Create or modify a spreadsheet with data. Supports creating sheets, writing cell values, and applying basic formulas.
  Parameters:
    - title (string, required): Title of the spreadsheet
    - data (array, required): Two-dimensional array of cell values representing rows and columns
    - sheet_name (string, optional): Name of the worksheet tab

Tool: pdf_extract
  Description: Extract text content, tables, and metadata from a PDF document. Returns structured text with page boundaries preserved.
  Parameters:
    - file_path (string, required): Path to the PDF file to extract content from
    - pages (string, optional): Page range to extract (e.g., "1-5", "1,3,7")
    - extract_tables (boolean, optional): If true, attempt to extract tabular data as structured arrays

Tool: code_review
  Description: Perform an automated code review on a file or code snippet. Identifies bugs, security issues, style violations, and suggests improvements.
  Parameters:
    - code (string, required): The source code to review, or a file path
    - language (string, optional): Programming language of the code [javascript, typescript, python, java, go, rust, csharp]
    - focus (string, optional): Area to focus the review on [bugs, security, performance, style, all]

Tool: git_operation
  Description: Perform git version control operations on a repository. Supports common operations like commit, push, pull, branch, and status.
  Parameters:
    - operation (string, required): The git operation to perform [status, commit, push, pull, branch, checkout, log, diff]
    - message (string, optional): Commit message (required for commit operation)
    - branch (string, optional): Branch name for branch or checkout operations

Tool: api_request
  Description: Make an HTTP request to an external API endpoint. Supports all HTTP methods, custom headers, and request bodies.
  Parameters:
    - url (string, required): The full URL of the API endpoint
    - method (string, required): HTTP method to use [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE]
    - headers (object, optional): HTTP headers as key-value pairs
    - body (string, optional): Request body content, typically JSON

Tool: convert_currency
  Description: Convert an amount from one currency to another using real-time exchange rates. Supports all major world currencies.
  Parameters:
    - amount (number, required): The amount of money to convert
    - from_currency (string, required): Source currency ISO code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)
    - to_currency (string, required): Target currency ISO code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)

Tool: calculate
  Description: Evaluate a mathematical expression or perform calculations. Supports arithmetic, trigonometry, statistics, and symbolic math.
  Parameters:
    - expression (string, required): The mathematical expression to evaluate (e.g., "sqrt(144) + 3^2")
    - precision (number, optional): Number of decimal places in the result

Tool: set_reminder
  Description: Set a reminder that will trigger a notification at the specified time. Supports one-time and recurring reminders.
  Parameters:
    - message (string, required): The reminder message text
    - time (string, required): When to trigger the reminder in ISO 8601 format or natural language
    - recurrence (string, optional): Recurrence pattern for repeating reminders [none, daily, weekly, monthly]

Tool: screenshot
  Description: Capture a screenshot of a web page at a given URL. Returns an image of the rendered page.
  Parameters:
    - url (string, required): The URL of the web page to screenshot
    - viewport (string, optional): Viewport size as widthxheight in pixels [1280x720, 1920x1080, 375x812, 768x1024]
    - full_page (boolean, optional): If true, capture the entire scrollable page

Tool: text_to_speech
  Description: Convert text into spoken audio. Returns an audio file URL with the synthesized speech.
  Parameters:
    - text (string, required): The text to convert to speech
    - language (string, optional): Language and locale code (e.g., en-US, de-DE, ja-JP)
    - voice (string, optional): Voice selection [male_1, female_1, male_2, female_2]

Tool: qr_code
  Description: Generate a QR code image encoding the provided data. Supports URLs, text, contact cards, and Wi-Fi credentials.
  Parameters:
    - data (string, required): The data to encode in the QR code
    - size (number, optional): Size of the QR code image in pixels (width and height)

Tool: compress_files
  Description: Compress one or more files into an archive. Supports ZIP, TAR.GZ, and 7Z formats.
  Parameters:
    - files (array, required): List of file paths to include in the archive
    - output_path (string, required): Path for the output archive file
    - format (string, optional): Archive format to use [zip, tar.gz, 7z]

Tool: dns_lookup
  Description: Perform a DNS lookup for a domain name. Returns DNS records including A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, TXT, and NS records.
  Parameters:
    - domain (string, required): The domain name to look up
    - record_type (string, optional): Type of DNS record to query [A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, TXT, NS, ALL]

User message: Read the contents of /etc/nginx/nginx.conf and show me what is in it.

  Description: Evaluate a mathematical expression or perform calculations. Supports arithmetic, trigonometry, statistics, and symbolic math.
  Parameters:
    - expression (string, required): The mathematical expression to evaluate (e.g., "sqrt(144) + 3^2")
    - precision (number, optional): Number of decimal places in the result

Tool: set_reminder
  Description: Set a reminder that will trigger a notification at the specified time. Supports one-time and recurring reminders.
  Parameters:
    - message (string, required): The reminder message text
    - time (string, required): When to trigger the reminder in ISO 8601 format or natural language
    - recurrence (string, optional): Recurrence pattern for repeating reminders [none, daily, weekly, monthly]

Tool: screenshot
  Description: Capture a screenshot of a web page at a given URL. Returns an image of the rendered page.
  Parameters:
    - url (string, required): The URL of the web page to screenshot
    - viewport (string, optional): Viewport size as widthxheight in pixels [1280x720, 1920x1080, 375x812, 768x1024]
    - full_page (boolean, optional): If true, capture the entire scrollable page

Tool: text_to_speech
  Description: Convert text into spoken audio. Returns an audio file URL with the synthesized speech.
  Parameters:
    - text (string, required): The text to convert to speech
    - language (string, optional): Language and locale code (e.g., en-US, de-DE, ja-JP)
    - voice (string, optional): Voice selection [male_1, female_1, male_2, female_2]

Tool: qr_code
  Description: Generate a QR code image encoding the provided data. Supports URLs, text, contact cards, and Wi-Fi credentials.
  Parameters:
    - data (string, required): The data to encode in the QR code
    - size (number, optional): Size of the QR code image in pixels (width and height)

Tool: compress_files
  Description: Compress one or more files into an archive. Supports ZIP, TAR.GZ, and 7Z formats.
  Parameters:
    - files (array, required): List of file paths to include in the archive
    - output_path (string, required): Path for the output archive file
    - format (string, optional): Archive format to use [zip, tar.gz, 7z]

Tool: dns_lookup
  Description: Perform a DNS lookup for a domain name. Returns DNS records including A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, TXT, and NS records.
  Parameters:
    - domain (string, required): The domain name to look up
    - record_type (string, optional): Type of DNS record to query [A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, TXT, NS, ALL]

name: Translate Text
natural_prompt:
You are a helpful assistant with access to the following tools.
For each user message, respond with ONLY the tool name(s) you would use, separated by commas. If no tool is needed, respond with "none".
Do not explain your reasoning. Only output tool names.

Available tools:

Tool: web_search
  Description: Search the web for current information. Use this tool when you need to find recent events, news, product information, or any data that may have changed since your training cutoff.
  Parameters:
    - query (string, required): The search query to find relevant web pages
    - num_results (number, optional): Number of results to return, between 1 and 20
    - time_range (string, optional): Filter results by time period [past_hour, past_day, past_week, past_month, past_year]

Tool: send_email
  Description: Send an email message to one or more recipients. Supports plain text and HTML content, attachments, and CC/BCC recipients.
  Parameters:
    - to (string, required): Recipient email address or comma-separated list of addresses
    - subject (string, required): Email subject line
    - body (string, required): Email body content in plain text or HTML
    - cc (string, optional): CC recipient email address or comma-separated list
    - attachments (array, optional): List of file paths to attach to the email

Tool: create_task
  Description: Create a new task or to-do item in the task management system. Tasks can be assigned to team members with due dates and priority levels.
  Parameters:
    - title (string, required): Title or name of the task
    - description (string, optional): Detailed description of what needs to be done
    - assignee (string, optional): Username or email of the person responsible
    - due_date (string, optional): Due date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)
    - priority (string, optional): Priority level of the task [low, medium, high, critical]

Tool: read_file
  Description: Read the contents of a file from the local filesystem. Returns the full text content of the specified file.
  Parameters:
    - path (string, required): Absolute or relative path to the file to read
    - encoding (string, optional): Character encoding to use when reading the file [utf-8, ascii, latin1, utf-16]

Tool: write_file
  Description: Write content to a file on the local filesystem. Creates the file if it does not exist, or overwrites the existing content.
  Parameters:
    - path (string, required): Absolute or relative path to the file to write
    - content (string, required): The text content to write to the file
    - append (boolean, optional): If true, append to the file instead of overwriting

Tool: run_command
  Description: Execute a shell command on the local system. Returns the standard output, standard error, and exit code of the command.
  Parameters:
    - command (string, required): The shell command to execute
    - working_dir (string, optional): Working directory for command execution
    - timeout (number, optional): Maximum execution time in seconds before the command is killed

Tool: calendar_event
  Description: Create, update, or query calendar events. Supports setting time, location, attendees, and recurrence rules for scheduling.
  Parameters:
    - action (string, required): The calendar operation to perform [create, update, delete, list]
    - title (string, required): Title or name of the calendar event
    - start_time (string, optional): Event start time in ISO 8601 format
    - end_time (string, optional): Event end time in ISO 8601 format
    - attendees (array, optional): List of attendee email addresses

Tool: database_query
  Description: Execute a SQL query against the connected database. Supports SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE operations with parameterized queries.
  Parameters:
    - query (string, required): The SQL query to execute
    - params (array, optional): Parameterized values to safely inject into the query
    - database (string, optional): Name of the database to query, defaults to the primary database

Tool: translate_text
  Description: Translate text from one language to another. Supports over 100 languages with automatic source language detection.
  Parameters:
    - text (string, required): The text to translate
    - target_language (string, required): Target language code (e.g., en, de, fr, ja, zh)
    - source_language (string, optional): Source language code; if omitted, language is auto-detected

Tool: image_generate
  Description: Generate an image from a text description using AI image generation. Returns a URL to the generated image.
  Parameters:
    - prompt (string, required): Detailed text description of the image to generate
    - size (string, optional): Image dimensions in pixels [256x256, 512x512, 1024x1024, 1792x1024]
    - style (string, optional): Visual style for the generated image [photorealistic, illustration, watercolor, sketch]

Tool: get_weather
  Description: Get current weather conditions and forecast for a specified location. Returns temperature, humidity, wind speed, and conditions.
  Parameters:
    - location (string, required): City name, ZIP code, or coordinates (lat,lon)
    - units (string, optional): Temperature units [celsius, fahrenheit]
    - forecast_days (number, optional): Number of forecast days to include (1-7)

Tool: slack_message
  Description: Send a message to a Slack channel or user. Supports rich text formatting, mentions, and thread replies.
  Parameters:
    - channel (string, required): Slack channel name (e.g., #general) or user ID for direct message
    - message (string, required): The message text to send, supports Slack markdown
    - thread_ts (string, optional): Timestamp of parent message to reply in a thread

Tool: create_spreadsheet
  Description: Create or modify a spreadsheet with data. Supports creating sheets, writing cell values, and applying basic formulas.
  Parameters:
    - title (string, required): Title of the spreadsheet
    - data (array, required): Two-dimensional array of cell values representing rows and columns
    - sheet_name (string, optional): Name of the worksheet tab

Tool: pdf_extract
  Description: Extract text content, tables, and metadata from a PDF document. Returns structured text with page boundaries preserved.
  Parameters:
    - file_path (string, required): Path to the PDF file to extract content from
    - pages (string, optional): Page range to extract (e.g., "1-5", "1,3,7")
    - extract_tables (boolean, optional): If true, attempt to extract tabular data as structured arrays

Tool: code_review
  Description: Perform an automated code review on a file or code snippet. Identifies bugs, security issues, style violations, and suggests improvements.
  Parameters:
    - code (string, required): The source code to review, or a file path
    - language (string, optional): Programming language of the code [javascript, typescript, python, java, go, rust, csharp]
    - focus (string, optional): Area to focus the review on [bugs, security, performance, style, all]

Tool: git_operation
  Description: Perform git version control operations on a repository. Supports common operations like commit, push, pull, branch, and status.
  Parameters:
    - operation (string, required): The git operation to perform [status, commit, push, pull, branch, checkout, log, diff]
    - message (string, optional): Commit message (required for commit operation)
    - branch (string, optional): Branch name for branch or checkout operations

Tool: api_request
  Description: Make an HTTP request to an external API endpoint. Supports all HTTP methods, custom headers, and request bodies.
  Parameters:
    - url (string, required): The full URL of the API endpoint
    - method (string, required): HTTP method to use [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE]
    - headers (object, optional): HTTP headers as key-value pairs
    - body (string, optional): Request body content, typically JSON

Tool: convert_currency
  Description: Convert an amount from one currency to another using real-time exchange rates. Supports all major world currencies.
  Parameters:
    - amount (number, required): The amount of money to convert
    - from_currency (string, required): Source currency ISO code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)
    - to_currency (string, required): Target currency ISO code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)

Tool: calculate
  Description: Evaluate a mathematical expression or perform calculations. Supports arithmetic, trigonometry, statistics, and symbolic math.
  Parameters:
    - expression (string, required): The mathematical expression to evaluate (e.g., "sqrt(144) + 3^2")
    - precision (number, optional): Number of decimal places in the result

Tool: set_reminder
  Description: Set a reminder that will trigger a notification at the specified time. Supports one-time and recurring reminders.
  Parameters:
    - message (string, required): The reminder message text
    - time (string, required): When to trigger the reminder in ISO 8601 format or natural language
    - recurrence (string, optional): Recurrence pattern for repeating reminders [none, daily, weekly, monthly]

Tool: screenshot
  Description: Capture a screenshot of a web page at a given URL. Returns an image of the rendered page.
  Parameters:
    - url (string, required): The URL of the web page to screenshot
    - viewport (string, optional): Viewport size as widthxheight in pixels [1280x720, 1920x1080, 375x812, 768x1024]
    - full_page (boolean, optional): If true, capture the entire scrollable page

Tool: text_to_speech
  Description: Convert text into spoken audio. Returns an audio file URL with the synthesized speech.
  Parameters:
    - text (string, required): The text to convert to speech
    - language (string, optional): Language and locale code (e.g., en-US, de-DE, ja-JP)
    - voice (string, optional): Voice selection [male_1, female_1, male_2, female_2]

Tool: qr_code
  Description: Generate a QR code image encoding the provided data. Supports URLs, text, contact cards, and Wi-Fi credentials.
  Parameters:
    - data (string, required): The data to encode in the QR code
    - size (number, optional): Size of the QR code image in pixels (width and height)

Tool: compress_files
  Description: Compress one or more files into an archive. Supports ZIP, TAR.GZ, and 7Z formats.
  Parameters:
    - files (array, required): List of file paths to include in the archive
    - output_path (string, required): Path for the output archive file
    - format (string, optional): Archive format to use [zip, tar.gz, 7z]

Tool: dns_lookup
  Description: Perform a DNS lookup for a domain name. Returns DNS records including A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, TXT, and NS records.
  Parameters:
    - domain (string, required): The domain name to look up
    - record_type (string, optional): Type of DNS record to query [A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, TXT, NS, ALL]

name: Database Query
natural_prompt:
You are a helpful assistant with access to the following tools.
For each user message, respond with ONLY the tool name(s) you would use, separated by commas. If no tool is needed, respond with "none".
Do not explain your reasoning. Only output tool names.

Available tools:

Tool: web_search
  Description: Search the web for current information. Use this tool when you need to find recent events, news, product information, or any data that may have changed since your training cutoff.
  Parameters:
    - query (string, required): The search query to find relevant web pages
    - num_results (number, optional): Number of results to return, between 1 and 20
    - time_range (string, optional): Filter results by time period [past_hour, past_day, past_week, past_month, past_year]

Tool: send_email
  Description: Send an email message to one or more recipients. Supports plain text and HTML content, attachments, and CC/BCC recipients.
  Parameters:
    - to (string, required): Recipient email address or comma-separated list of addresses
    - subject (string, required): Email subject line
    - body (string, required): Email body content in plain text or HTML
    - cc (string, optional): CC recipient email address or comma-separated list
    - attachments (array, optional): List of file paths to attach to the email

Tool: create_task
  Description: Create a new task or to-do item in the task management system. Tasks can be assigned to team members with due dates and priority levels.
  Parameters:
    - title (string, required): Title or name of the task
    - description (string, optional): Detailed description of what needs to be done
    - assignee (string, optional): Username or email of the person responsible
    - due_date (string, optional): Due date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)
    - priority (string, optional): Priority level of the task [low, medium, high, critical]

Tool: read_file
  Description: Read the contents of a file from the local filesystem. Returns the full text content of the specified file.
  Parameters:
    - path (string, required): Absolute or relative path to the file to read
    - encoding (string, optional): Character encoding to use when reading the file [utf-8, ascii, latin1, utf-16]

Tool: write_file
  Description: Write content to a file on the local filesystem. Creates the file if it does not exist, or overwrites the existing content.
  Parameters:
    - path (string, required): Absolute or relative path to the file to write
    - content (string, required): The text content to write to the file
    - append (boolean, optional): If true, append to the file instead of overwriting

Tool: run_command
  Description: Execute a shell command on the local system. Returns the standard output, standard error, and exit code of the command.
  Parameters:
    - command (string, required): The shell command to execute
    - working_dir (string, optional): Working directory for command execution
    - timeout (number, optional): Maximum execution time in seconds before the command is killed

Tool: calendar_event
  Description: Create, update, or query calendar events. Supports setting time, location, attendees, and recurrence rules for scheduling.
  Parameters:
    - action (string, required): The calendar operation to perform [create, update, delete, list]
    - title (string, required): Title or name of the calendar event
    - start_time (string, optional): Event start time in ISO 8601 format
    - end_time (string, optional): Event end time in ISO 8601 format
    - attendees (array, optional): List of attendee email addresses

Tool: database_query
  Description: Execute a SQL query against the connected database. Supports SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE operations with parameterized queries.
  Parameters:
    - query (string, required): The SQL query to execute
    - params (array, optional): Parameterized values to safely inject into the query
    - database (string, optional): Name of the database to query, defaults to the primary database

Tool: translate_text
  Description: Translate text from one language to another. Supports over 100 languages with automatic source language detection.
  Parameters:
    - text (string, required): The text to translate
    - target_language (string, required): Target language code (e.g., en, de, fr, ja, zh)
    - source_language (string, optional): Source language code; if omitted, language is auto-detected

Tool: image_generate
  Description: Generate an image from a text description using AI image generation. Returns a URL to the generated image.
  Parameters:
    - prompt (string, required): Detailed text description of the image to generate
    - size (string, optional): Image dimensions in pixels [256x256, 512x512, 1024x1024, 1792x1024]
    - style (string, optional): Visual style for the generated image [photorealistic, illustration, watercolor, sketch]

Tool: get_weather
  Description: Get current weather conditions and forecast for a specified location. Returns temperature, humidity, wind speed, and conditions.
  Parameters:
    - location (string, required): City name, ZIP code, or coordinates (lat,lon)
    - units (string, optional): Temperature units [celsius, fahrenheit]
    - forecast_days (number, optional): Number of forecast days to include (1-7)

Tool: slack_message
  Description: Send a message to a Slack channel or user. Supports rich text formatting, mentions, and thread replies.
  Parameters:
    - channel (string, required): Slack channel name (e.g., #general) or user ID for direct message
    - message (string, required): The message text to send, supports Slack markdown
    - thread_ts (string, optional): Timestamp of parent message to reply in a thread

Tool: create_spreadsheet
  Description: Create or modify a spreadsheet with data. Supports creating sheets, writing cell values, and applying basic formulas.
  Parameters:
    - title (string, required): Title of the spreadsheet
    - data (array, required): Two-dimensional array of cell values representing rows and columns
    - sheet_name (string, optional): Name of the worksheet tab

Tool: pdf_extract
  Description: Extract text content, tables, and metadata from a PDF document. Returns structured text with page boundaries preserved.
  Parameters:
    - file_path (string, required): Path to the PDF file to extract content from
    - pages (string, optional): Page range to extract (e.g., "1-5", "1,3,7")
    - extract_tables (boolean, optional): If true, attempt to extract tabular data as structured arrays

Tool: code_review
  Description: Perform an automated code review on a file or code snippet. Identifies bugs, security issues, style violations, and suggests improvements.
  Parameters:
    - code (string, required): The source code to review, or a file path
    - language (string, optional): Programming language of the code [javascript, typescript, python, java, go, rust, csharp]
    - focus (string, optional): Area to focus the review on [bugs, security, performance, style, all]

Tool: git_operation
  Description: Perform git version control operations on a repository. Supports common operations like commit, push, pull, branch, and status.
  Parameters:
    - operation (string, required): The git operation to perform [status, commit, push, pull, branch, checkout, log, diff]
    - message (string, optional): Commit message (required for commit operation)
    - branch (string, optional): Branch name for branch or checkout operations

Tool: api_request
  Description: Make an HTTP request to an external API endpoint. Supports all HTTP methods, custom headers, and request bodies.
  Parameters:
    - url (string, required): The full URL of the API endpoint
    - method (string, required): HTTP method to use [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE]
    - headers (object, optional): HTTP headers as key-value pairs
    - body (string, optional): Request body content, typically JSON

Tool: convert_currency
  Description: Convert an amount from one currency to another using real-time exchange rates. Supports all major world currencies.
  Parameters:
    - amount (number, required): The amount of money to convert
    - from_currency (string, required): Source currency ISO code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)
    - to_currency (string, required): Target currency ISO code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)

Tool: calculate
  Description: Evaluate a mathematical expression or perform calculations. Supports arithmetic, trigonometry, statistics, and symbolic math.
  Parameters:
    - expression (string, required): The mathematical expression to evaluate (e.g., "sqrt(144) + 3^2")
    - precision (number, optional): Number of decimal places in the result

Tool: set_reminder
  Description: Set a reminder that will trigger a notification at the specified time. Supports one-time and recurring reminders.
  Parameters:
    - message (string, required): The reminder message text
    - time (string, required): When to trigger the reminder in ISO 8601 format or natural language
    - recurrence (string, optional): Recurrence pattern for repeating reminders [none, daily, weekly, monthly]

Tool: screenshot
  Description: Capture a screenshot of a web page at a given URL. Returns an image of the rendered page.
  Parameters:
    - url (string, required): The URL of the web page to screenshot
    - viewport (string, optional): Viewport size as widthxheight in pixels [1280x720, 1920x1080, 375x812, 768x1024]
    - full_page (boolean, optional): If true, capture the entire scrollable page

Tool: text_to_speech
  Description: Convert text into spoken audio. Returns an audio file URL with the synthesized speech.
  Parameters:
    - text (string, required): The text to convert to speech
    - language (string, optional): Language and locale code (e.g., en-US, de-DE, ja-JP)
    - voice (string, optional): Voice selection [male_1, female_1, male_2, female_2]

Tool: qr_code
  Description: Generate a QR code image encoding the provided data. Supports URLs, text, contact cards, and Wi-Fi credentials.
  Parameters:
    - data (string, required): The data to encode in the QR code
    - size (number, optional): Size of the QR code image in pixels (width and height)

Tool: compress_files
  Description: Compress one or more files into an archive. Supports ZIP, TAR.GZ, and 7Z formats.
  Parameters:
    - files (array, required): List of file paths to include in the archive
    - output_path (string, required): Path for the output archive file
    - format (string, optional): Archive format to use [zip, tar.gz, 7z]

Tool: dns_lookup
  Description: Perform a DNS lookup for a domain name. Returns DNS records including A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, TXT, and NS records.
  Parameters:
    - domain (string, required): The domain name to look up
    - record_type (string, optional): Type of DNS record to query [A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, TXT, NS, ALL]

User message: Run this SQL query on the production database: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE created_at > "2024-01-01"

    - code (string, required): The source code to review, or a file path
    - language (string, optional): Programming language of the code [javascript, typescript, python, java, go, rust, csharp]
    - focus (string, optional): Area to focus the review on [bugs, security, performance, style, all]

Tool: git_operation
  Description: Perform git version control operations on a repository. Supports common operations like commit, push, pull, branch, and status.
  Parameters:
    - operation (string, required): The git operation to perform [status, commit, push, pull, branch, checkout, log, diff]
    - message (string, optional): Commit message (required for commit operation)
    - branch (string, optional): Branch name for branch or checkout operations

Tool: api_request
  Description: Make an HTTP request to an external API endpoint. Supports all HTTP methods, custom headers, and request bodies.
  Parameters:
    - url (string, required): The full URL of the API endpoint
    - method (string, required): HTTP method to use [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE]
    - headers (object, optional): HTTP headers as key-value pairs
    - body (string, optional): Request body content, typically JSON

Tool: convert_currency
  Description: Convert an amount from one currency to another using real-time exchange rates. Supports all major world currencies.
  Parameters:
    - amount (number, required): The amount of money to convert
    - from_currency (string, required): Source currency ISO code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)
    - to_currency (string, required): Target currency ISO code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)

Tool: calculate
  Description: Evaluate a mathematical expression or perform calculations. Supports arithmetic, trigonometry, statistics, and symbolic math.
  Parameters:
    - expression (string, required): The mathematical expression to evaluate (e.g., "sqrt(144) + 3^2")
    - precision (number, optional): Number of decimal places in the result

Tool: set_reminder
  Description: Set a reminder that will trigger a notification at the specified time. Supports one-time and recurring reminders.
  Parameters:
    - message (string, required): The reminder message text
    - time (string, required): When to trigger the reminder in ISO 8601 format or natural language
    - recurrence (string, optional): Recurrence pattern for repeating reminders [none, daily, weekly, monthly]

Tool: screenshot
  Description: Capture a screenshot of a web page at a given URL. Returns an image of the rendered page.
  Parameters:
    - url (string, required): The URL of the web page to screenshot
    - viewport (string, optional): Viewport size as widthxheight in pixels [1280x720, 1920x1080, 375x812, 768x1024]
    - full_page (boolean, optional): If true, capture the entire scrollable page

Tool: text_to_speech
  Description: Convert text into spoken audio. Returns an audio file URL with the synthesized speech.
  Parameters:
    - text (string, required): The text to convert to speech
    - language (string, optional): Language and locale code (e.g., en-US, de-DE, ja-JP)
    - voice (string, optional): Voice selection [male_1, female_1, male_2, female_2]

Tool: qr_code
  Description: Generate a QR code image encoding the provided data. Supports URLs, text, contact cards, and Wi-Fi credentials.
  Parameters:
    - data (string, required): The data to encode in the QR code
    - size (number, optional): Size of the QR code image in pixels (width and height)

Tool: compress_files
  Description: Compress one or more files into an archive. Supports ZIP, TAR.GZ, and 7Z formats.
  Parameters:
    - files (array, required): List of file paths to include in the archive
    - output_path (string, required): Path for the output archive file
    - format (string, optional): Archive format to use [zip, tar.gz, 7z]

Tool: dns_lookup
  Description: Perform a DNS lookup for a domain name. Returns DNS records including A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, TXT, and NS records.
  Parameters:
    - domain (string, required): The domain name to look up
    - record_type (string, optional): Type of DNS record to query [A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, TXT, NS, ALL]

name: Image Generate
natural_prompt:
You are a helpful assistant with access to the following tools.
For each user message, respond with ONLY the tool name(s) you would use, separated by commas. If no tool is needed, respond with "none".
Do not explain your reasoning. Only output tool names.

Available tools:

Tool: web_search
  Description: Search the web for current information. Use this tool when you need to find recent events, news, product information, or any data that may have changed since your training cutoff.
  Parameters:
    - query (string, required): The search query to find relevant web pages
    - num_results (number, optional): Number of results to return, between 1 and 20
    - time_range (string, optional): Filter results by time period [past_hour, past_day, past_week, past_month, past_year]

Tool: send_email
  Description: Send an email message to one or more recipients. Supports plain text and HTML content, attachments, and CC/BCC recipients.
  Parameters:
    - to (string, required): Recipient email address or comma-separated list of addresses
    - subject (string, required): Email subject line
    - body (string, required): Email body content in plain text or HTML
    - cc (string, optional): CC recipient email address or comma-separated list
    - attachments (array, optional): List of file paths to attach to the email

Tool: create_task
  Description: Create a new task or to-do item in the task management system. Tasks can be assigned to team members with due dates and priority levels.
  Parameters:
    - title (string, required): Title or name of the task
    - description (string, optional): Detailed description of what needs to be done
    - assignee (string, optional): Username or email of the person responsible
    - due_date (string, optional): Due date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)
    - priority (string, optional): Priority level of the task [low, medium, high, critical]

Tool: read_file
  Description: Read the contents of a file from the local filesystem. Returns the full text content of the specified file.
  Parameters:
    - path (string, required): Absolute or relative path to the file to read
    - encoding (string, optional): Character encoding to use when reading the file [utf-8, ascii, latin1, utf-16]

Tool: write_file
  Description: Write content to a file on the local filesystem. Creates the file if it does not exist, or overwrites the existing content.
  Parameters:
    - path (string, required): Absolute or relative path to the file to write
    - content (string, required): The text content to write to the file
    - append (boolean, optional): If true, append to the file instead of overwriting

Tool: run_command
  Description: Execute a shell command on the local system. Returns the standard output, standard error, and exit code of the command.
  Parameters:
    - command (string, required): The shell command to execute
    - working_dir (string, optional): Working directory for command execution
    - timeout (number, optional): Maximum execution time in seconds before the command is killed

Tool: calendar_event
  Description: Create, update, or query calendar events. Supports setting time, location, attendees, and recurrence rules for scheduling.
  Parameters:
    - action (string, required): The calendar operation to perform [create, update, delete, list]
    - title (string, required): Title or name of the calendar event
    - start_time (string, optional): Event start time in ISO 8601 format
    - end_time (string, optional): Event end time in ISO 8601 format
    - attendees (array, optional): List of attendee email addresses

Tool: database_query
  Description: Execute a SQL query against the connected database. Supports SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE operations with parameterized queries.
  Parameters:
    - query (string, required): The SQL query to execute
    - params (array, optional): Parameterized values to safely inject into the query
    - database (string, optional): Name of the database to query, defaults to the primary database

Tool: translate_text
  Description: Translate text from one language to another. Supports over 100 languages with automatic source language detection.
  Parameters:
    - text (string, required): The text to translate
    - target_language (string, required): Target language code (e.g., en, de, fr, ja, zh)
    - source_language (string, optional): Source language code; if omitted, language is auto-detected

Tool: image_generate
  Description: Generate an image from a text description using AI image generation. Returns a URL to the generated image.
  Parameters:
    - prompt (string, required): Detailed text description of the image to generate
    - size (string, optional): Image dimensions in pixels [256x256, 512x512, 1024x1024, 1792x1024]
    - style (string, optional): Visual style for the generated image [photorealistic, illustration, watercolor, sketch]

Tool: get_weather
  Description: Get current weather conditions and forecast for a specified location. Returns temperature, humidity, wind speed, and conditions.
  Parameters:
    - location (string, required): City name, ZIP code, or coordinates (lat,lon)
    - units (string, optional): Temperature units [celsius, fahrenheit]
    - forecast_days (number, optional): Number of forecast days to include (1-7)

Tool: slack_message
  Description: Send a message to a Slack channel or user. Supports rich text formatting, mentions, and thread replies.
  Parameters:
    - channel (string, required): Slack channel name (e.g., #general) or user ID for direct message
    - message (string, required): The message text to send, supports Slack markdown
    - thread_ts (string, optional): Timestamp of parent message to reply in a thread

Tool: create_spreadsheet
  Description: Create or modify a spreadsheet with data. Supports creating sheets, writing cell values, and applying basic formulas.
  Parameters:
    - title (string, required): Title of the spreadsheet
    - data (array, required): Two-dimensional array of cell values representing rows and columns
    - sheet_name (string, optional): Name of the worksheet tab

Tool: pdf_extract
  Description: Extract text content, tables, and metadata from a PDF document. Returns structured text with page boundaries preserved.
  Parameters:
    - file_path (string, required): Path to the PDF file to extract content from
    - pages (string, optional): Page range to extract (e.g., "1-5", "1,3,7")
    - extract_tables (boolean, optional): If true, attempt to extract tabular data as structured arrays

Tool: code_review
  Description: Perform an automated code review on a file or code snippet. Identifies bugs, security issues, style violations, and suggests improvements.
  Parameters:
    - code (string, required): The source code to review, or a file path
    - language (string, optional): Programming language of the code [javascript, typescript, python, java, go, rust, csharp]
    - focus (string, optional): Area to focus the review on [bugs, security, performance, style, all]

Tool: git_operation
  Description: Perform git version control operations on a repository. Supports common operations like commit, push, pull, branch, and status.
  Parameters:
    - operation (string, required): The git operation to perform [status, commit, push, pull, branch, checkout, log, diff]
    - message (string, optional): Commit message (required for commit operation)
    - branch (string, optional): Branch name for branch or checkout operations

Tool: api_request
  Description: Make an HTTP request to an external API endpoint. Supports all HTTP methods, custom headers, and request bodies.
  Parameters:
    - url (string, required): The full URL of the API endpoint
    - method (string, required): HTTP method to use [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE]
    - headers (object, optional): HTTP headers as key-value pairs
    - body (string, optional): Request body content, typically JSON

Tool: convert_currency
  Description: Convert an amount from one currency to another using real-time exchange rates. Supports all major world currencies.
  Parameters:
    - amount (number, required): The amount of money to convert
    - from_currency (string, required): Source currency ISO code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)
    - to_currency (string, required): Target currency ISO code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)

Tool: calculate
  Description: Evaluate a mathematical expression or perform calculations. Supports arithmetic, trigonometry, statistics, and symbolic math.
  Parameters:
    - expression (string, required): The mathematical expression to evaluate (e.g., "sqrt(144) + 3^2")
    - precision (number, optional): Number of decimal places in the result

Tool: set_reminder
  Description: Set a reminder that will trigger a notification at the specified time. Supports one-time and recurring reminders.
  Parameters:
    - message (string, required): The reminder message text
    - time (string, required): When to trigger the reminder in ISO 8601 format or natural language
    - recurrence (string, optional): Recurrence pattern for repeating reminders [none, daily, weekly, monthly]

Tool: screenshot
  Description: Capture a screenshot of a web page at a given URL. Returns an image of the rendered page.
  Parameters:
    - url (string, required): The URL of the web page to screenshot
    - viewport (string, optional): Viewport size as widthxheight in pixels [1280x720, 1920x1080, 375x812, 768x1024]
    - full_page (boolean, optional): If true, capture the entire scrollable page

Tool: text_to_speech
  Description: Convert text into spoken audio. Returns an audio file URL with the synthesized speech.
  Parameters:
    - text (string, required): The text to convert to speech
    - language (string, optional): Language and locale code (e.g., en-US, de-DE, ja-JP)
    - voice (string, optional): Voice selection [male_1, female_1, male_2, female_2]

Tool: qr_code
  Description: Generate a QR code image encoding the provided data. Supports URLs, text, contact cards, and Wi-Fi credentials.
  Parameters:
    - data (string, required): The data to encode in the QR code
    - size (number, optional): Size of the QR code image in pixels (width and height)

Tool: compress_files
  Description: Compress one or more files into an archive. Supports ZIP, TAR.GZ, and 7Z formats.
  Parameters:
    - files (array, required): List of file paths to include in the archive
    - output_path (string, required): Path for the output archive file
    - format (string, optional): Archive format to use [zip, tar.gz, 7z]

Tool: dns_lookup
  Description: Perform a DNS lookup for a domain name. Returns DNS records including A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, TXT, and NS records.
  Parameters:
    - domain (string, required): The domain name to look up
    - record_type (string, optional): Type of DNS record to query [A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, TXT, NS, ALL]
